# Copilot Instructions

- Keep this a zero-build HTML/CSS/JS project.
- Do not add Tailwind, Bootstrap, Vite, Webpack, Parcel, or any other framework/tooling unless explicitly requested.
- Do not add Aeonik font files unless this project has a valid license.
- Use `@aksell/ui` CDN links for base styles and standalone components.
- Do not copy CSS from `@aksell/ui` into this project.
- Keep project-specific styles in `style.css`.
- Run `npm run check` before handing off changes if npm is available.
